heading: Tuesday Night
text: Partly cloudy early, then clouds increasing from the west. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40, northeastern cold hollows in the lower 30s. Winds becoming light east of the Green Mountains, becoming south 5 to 10 mph from the Green Mountains westward.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers likely, except mainly in the afternoon northeast; chance of an afternoon thunderstorm west of the Greens. Highs from the mid 50s to around 60, except low to mid 50s northeast. South to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph west of the Greens.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Mostly cloudy, with periods of showers. Lows from the upper 30s to mid 40s. Southeast winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph early west of the Greens, then diminishing.
